author: Simon Cambier
description: Intelligent search for your notes, PDFs, and OCR for images.

manifest.author: Simon Cambier
manifest.description: A search engine that just works.
manifest.name: Omnisearch

name: Omnisearch

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Patched Dexie.js to remove the "dual package hazard" security. 

This security is very likely unneeded in the context of Obsidian plugins, we're properly using `import` and not `require`, and no other plugin should directly write in the Omnisearch database.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Technical release to fix some warnings and recommendations from https://community.obsidian.md/plugins/omnisearch scorecard

* Feature/537 add index files without extension by @Acallaris738 in https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/pull/538
* Fix: Skip excluded files during indexing when hideExcluded is enabled by @byte74128 in https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/pull/530
* feat: Highlight search result on open with cursor at match start by @Evgene-Kopylov in https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/pull/539

* Added support for Iconize plugin by @acrylicus in https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/pull/405

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Feat: enable search optimized tokenizer for Chinese by @aidenlx in https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/pull/370
* Loading large caches should no longer incur freezes at startup
* Users can now add weights to custom header properties
* Large refactoring to properly clean up several older warnings


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/compare/1.22.2...1.23.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - More refactoring
releases.name: 1.23.0-beta.5

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Cache loading is now asynchronous, which should fix startup freeze and greatly improve user experience for those affected. As a consequence, the loading is also now a bit slower, but Obsidian is usable and Omnisearch will display a little "please wait" message while it's working.
releases.name: 1.23.0-beta.3

releases.description:
(Re-release because I forgot to update the version in the manifest. Again.)

## What's Changed
* Add sandboxing to the sponsor button iframe by @dfaulkner in https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/pull/342
* Add ability to downrank some folders in the results by @eegrok in https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/pull/350
* Add shortcut to open note in a new split pane (Issue #202) by @pricebaldwin in https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/pull/358
* Improved scoring and highlighting for URLs

## New Contributors
* @dfaulkner made their first contribution in https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/pull/342

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- #164 Add a button to switch to In-File search on mobile
- #298 Improved "go to line" when opening a search result
- #303 Improved highlighting of Chinese words
- #304 Indexing more tokens. You can now search for urls (among other things)
  - Needs a cache clear
- #306 Fixed URL Scheme bug where the search field wasn't correctly filled
- #310 Added an opt-out to disable the HTTP server startup notice

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/compare/1.18.1...1.19.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- #293 [Feature request] Add support for DataLoom 8.6.0 
- #296 [BUG] Content inside of html tags isn't found in search

Added a localhost server to use Omnisearch's API from outside Obsidian. Use it with [a nice userscript](https://github.com/scambier/userscripts/raw/master/dist/obsidian-omnisearch-kagi.user.js) to get Omnisearch results directly in your browser :)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/compare/1.17.1...1.18.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Improved**
- #249 Added support for .webp images 
- Added a setting to configure search fuzziness
- #256 Added support for [DataLoom](https://github.com/trey-wallis/obsidian-dataloom) and [Dashboards](https://github.com/trey-wallis/obsidian-dashboards) files
- #254 If a file is unsupported (e.g. .xlsx or images without Text Extractor), its full path is now indexed
- #74 Boost unmarked tags

**Fixed**
- #225 Hyphenated words are now indexed whole _and_ split

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/compare/1.14.2...1.15.0

- ADDED - Experimental support for [Text Extractor](https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-text-extractor)
  - The main benefit for Omnisearch is the ability to synchronize extracted texts between devices (incl. mobile)
  - Text Extractor needs to be installed on all devices for the sync to work

- IMPROVED #158 - Greater ranges for customized weights
- IMPROVED #158 - Search cache is now automatically cleared when toggling diacritics
- IMPROVED #146 - `#sub/tags` now allow searching for `#sub`, `#tags`, and `#sub/tags`
- IMPROVED #141 - Added an excerpt in api results
- FIXED #168 - Backticks were stripped when "remove diacritics" was enabled, which caused scrolling offset issues
- FIXED - Navigation history (alt+up/down) was broken
- UPDATED - Tweaked fuzzy settings

## New Contributors

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This is mainly a performance/bugfixes update.

The underlying minisearch engine has been updated, and the cache system has been rewritten (_again_) to take advantage of performance improvements. Overall, indexing and cache reading/writing should take less time, and cause shorter freezes for larger vaults (1000+ notes & PDFs). Memory consumption should also be reduced.

As Omnisearch is getting more popular, I'm also having more reports of mobile crashes for users with large vaults. I'm sorry if it's happening to you, and while there's only so much I can do due to dependency constraints, rest assured that I'm doing my best to keep memory usage as low as possible.

- FIXED #138 - PDFs and OCR were switching off for Sync users
- FIXED #131 - Korean search matches were not correctly highlighted
- CHANGED #132 - PDFs are now disabled on mobile.
- CHANGED #103 - Search matches are now highlighted (instead of just bold) by default. Can be switched off.
- CHANGED #2 #127 - Ignored files can now be hidden. By default, they're just downranked.
- REGRESSION - Due to the new caching system, non-existing notes are no longer indexed. May be added back in a future update.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/compare/1.8.1...1.9.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Who knew that (efficiently) extracting texts from PDFs was so hard.

## PDF Management

- I couldn't make PDFJs run in the background, so I replaced it with a wasm (rust-based) solution
- Changed bundler from esbuild to Rollup, because wasm is much easier to integrate with Rollup
- Omnisearch imports PDFs in the background. This process uses a lot of CPU, so it spawns a maximum of `cpu.count() / 2` worker threads at once.
- Extracted text is cached, so PDFs are only treated once.
  - The PDF cache is unrelated to the notes cache, so you don't need to activate the later.
- TODO: remove deleted PDFs from the cache

## Other changes

- Refactored the cache management system, and compressed cache data

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/compare/1.6.4...1.6.5-beta.3
releases.name: 1.6.5-beta.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed Since 1.4.0
* Added a toggleable sidebar button to open Omnisearch https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/60
* Added a cache-clearing mechanism in case of corruption https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/83
* Improved: notes created by Omnisearch now honour the default note location https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/pull/81
* Improved: ctrl+click now opens the note in a new pane https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/61
* Improved highlighting https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/72 https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/85
* Fixed some bugs related to alias indexing https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/71
* Fixed layout issues related to Obsidian 0.15 https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/76
* Fixed: notes created by Omnisearch are now empty. They used to have the title pre-filled, but that caused issues with Templater https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/77
* Fixed some edge cases when opening an already open/pinned note https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/51 https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/80
* Fixed nested tags searching https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/79
* Fixed a silent crash when clicking on In-File search results https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/84

## New Contributors
* @franciskafieh made their first contribution in https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/pull/81

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/compare/1.4.0...1.5.0

## What's Changed

### New

- Opt-in support for Vim navigation keys: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/26
- Opt-in display of "short form" links: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/59
- Opt-in search index serialization, for faster loading times: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/pull/64 by @mnaoumov
- Diacritics are ignored by default
- Searching for a `#tag` will highly boost matching results: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/48
- Added a basic public API for integration with other plugins: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/22 https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/69
- Use `alt+enter` to inject a link in the active note, to the currently selected result item: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/32


### Improved

- You can now switch between "Vault" and "In-File" modals with `tab`
- Search index updates are now done only when Omnisearch is invoked: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/57

### Fixed

- Opening a pinned note would open it a second time: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/51
- Fixed an issue that would index "non-existing notes" multiple times: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/68

## New Contributors
* @mnaoumov made their first contribution in https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/pull/64

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/compare/1.3.4...1.4.0

## What's Changed
* New: Save/load index to files, improve logging by @mnaoumov in https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/pull/64
* New: Added a setting to ignore diacritics #53
* New: Added support of ctrl+jknp to navigate up/down in Vim mode #26
* New: Added a setting to hide the notes' full path #59

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* New: Chinese support by @aidenlx in https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/pull/37
  * You need to install https://github.com/aidenlx/cm-chs-patch to enable this feature
* New: settings page https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/41
* New: do not show indexing Notice by default by @chrisgrieser in https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/pull/46
* New: include notes that don't exist https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/14
* Improved: better accessibility https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/50
* Improved: note aliases are now scored as high as the filename in search results https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/34
* Improved: by default, reindexing is now done when the app is out of focus, and not after each save https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/57
  * On mobile, indexing is only done at startup
* Fixed: showing an error when a note can't be created https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/52

## New Contributors
* @aidenlx made their first contribution in https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/pull/37
* @chrisgrieser made their first contribution in https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/pull/46

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/compare/1.2.1...1.3.3

releases.description:
- [Faster loading times, thanks @pjeby
](https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/issues/21)
- Refactored the Svelte components to reduce code duplication
- Removed the bold from results title, so highlighted terms are visible
- Basic setup for unit tests (now I have to write them...)
- Building ES2021 code instead of ES6, since Electron supports it. The build file is also smaller, and (should be a bit) faster

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/compare/0.2.3...0.2.5

releases.description: **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/scambier/obsidian-omnisearch/compare/0.2.0...0.2.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changelog

- **In-file search!** 2 ways to access it:
  - From the active file, through the "Omnisearch: In-file search"
  - From the "Omnisearch: Vault search" selected note, with "alt+enter"
  - There's no weighting for in-file search results, they're just displayed in order
- The plugin has been rewritten with Svelte
- Debounced search for smoother results loading
- Removed the yellow highlight in favor of a simple bold. You can customize the `.omnisearch-highlight` css class with a snippet.

All pending feature requests will be adressed after Omnisearch submission into the official plugins repo.
